rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO VS. HERMANN STREET DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Bank Of America, N.A., As Successor By Merger To, Bank Of America N.A. As Successor By Merger To, Nomura Credit & Capital Inc.'S Motion For Order Charging Member'S Interest
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 16, 2012, line 1. Plaintiff Bank Of America, N.A.'s Motion For Order Charging Member's Interest. Grant Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s motion charging members interest as set forth in its proposed order which tracks California Corporation's Code Section 17302(a). = (501/REQ)
